title: English-Only Workbench Shell
objective: Create the direct, accessible, English-only Delta workbench shell without implementing ingestion or stylometric computation.
scope: Streamlit application entry point and workbench navigation
Text Proximity, Group Comparison, and Style Over Time purpose selection
Guided and Research mode shell with honestly disabled future controls
Central English UI string registry and shared state contract
Responsive, keyboard, copy, offline-network, and runtime-boundary evidence
non_goals: Editing lemmata.app or adding its future Launch Stylometry link
R stylo execution or scientific results
Production deployment, login, analytics, runtime AI, or permanent storage

acceptance.criterion: The workbench shell renders at desktop and mobile viewports without text overflow, incoherent overlap, or horizontal page scrolling.
The primary workflow is keyboard reachable and interactive controls expose accessible names and state.
Rendered and registered copy contains no prohibited authorship, confidence, universal ease, no-knowledge, or unverified reproducibility claim.
The shell loads with external network access blocked and makes no AI, analytics, login, or remote-storage request.
All user-facing application copy is retrieved from one English registry with no language selector or embedded Turkish/Italian locale.
Health and readiness output exposes the version and build identity without a system path, environment value, or secret.
Empty, loading, error, cancelled, and complete states have a versioned shared presentation contract and shell-level tests.

changed_files: Streamlit entry point, configuration, English UI catalog, visual system, public health record, and workbench contracts
Unit, shell, runtime-boundary, accessibility-supporting, copy, and health tests
P002 Ticket, PromptEvent, HumanDecision, Run, screenshot, browser, accessibility, network, copy, failure, and clean-clone evidence

commands.result: The first final pass stopped because webapp.py required automatic formatting after the accessibility edit.
Formatted the changed application module without changing behavior.
The second pass completed 40 tests at 100% coverage but the repository scan rejected a deliberate macOS home-directory test literal.
Passed format, lint, strict type, 40 tests, 100% measured source coverage, metadata, schema, repository, supply-chain, and R-lock checks.

commands.command: Browser desktop/mobile DOM, screenshot, and keyboard audit
commands.result: Accepted 1440x1000 and 390x844 views with no recorded overflow, panel overlap, unnamed visible control, external asset, or prohibited copy; keyboard purpose selection passed.

commands.command: Egress-denied Streamlit smoke test and negative controls
commands.result: The complete shell loaded with outbound networking denied; no external process socket, DOM asset, AI, analytics, login, or remote-storage request was observed.
A new clone of a888e7c restored both locks, passed 40 tests and every automated gate, and ended with no versionable changes.
